post.summary: get the token and user information
Send OTP to Email or Phone
post.description: Sends an OTP to the user's email or phone based on the specified type.

type.description: The type of OTP to send, either email or phone.

email.description: The email address to send the OTP to. Required if `type` is `email`.

phone.description: The phone number to send the OTP to. Required if `type` is `phone`.

email: The email field is required when type is email.

post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the user's email or phone. Marks the email or phone as verified upon successful OTP verification.

type.description: The type of verification, either email or phone.

email.description: The email address to verify. Required if `type` is `email`.

phone.description: The phone number to verify. Required if `type` is `phone`.

otp.description: The OTP sent to the email or phone.

email: The email field is required when type is email.

post.description: Verifies the OTP sent to the user's email or phone. Marks the email or phone as verified upon successful OTP verification.

email.description: The email address to verify. Required if `type` is `email`.

otp.description: The OTP sent to the email or phone.

email: The email field is required when type is email.

post.description: Allows users to reset their password by verifying an OTP sent to their email or phone.

type.description: The type of recovery method, either email or phone.

email.description: The email address of the user. Required if `type` is `email`.

phone.description: The phone number of the user. Required if `type` is `phone`.

otp.description: The OTP sent to the email or phone.

password.description: The new password for the user.

password_confirmation.description: Password confirmation must match the password.

email: The email field is required when type is email.

get.description: Returns a list of support tickets associated with the authenticated user.

post.summary: Create a new support ticket for the user
post.description: Allows a user to create a new support ticket and attach any optional files.

subject.description: The subject or title of the support ticket.

get.summary: Get details of a specific support ticket
get.description: Returns the details of a support ticket, including its replies and the user who made the reply.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the support ticket

put.description: Updates an existing support ticket. You can modify ticket details and attachments.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the support ticket to be updated

message.example: I cannot deposit funds, please assist.

delete.summary: Delete a support ticket and its attachments
delete.description: Allows a user to delete a support ticket along with any attached files.

parameters.name: ticket_no
parameters.description: The unique ticket number of the support ticket to delete

post.description: Allows the user to reply to an existing support ticket with a message and optional attachments.

parameters.name: ticket_no
parameters.description: The unique ticket number of the support ticket to reply to
